title: LGTM Stack — Unified Volume Summary
description: Executive summary of all observability data volume across the entire LGTM stack. One screen to monitor log, metric, trace, and profile ingestion rates, cardinality, week-over-week growth, and efficiency.

options.content:
LGTM Stack — Unified Volume Summary

Executive Overview • All Signals • All Clusters

Signal Coverage
Logs  •  Metrics  •  Traces  •  Profiles

panels.title: Log Ingestion
panels.description: Total byte throughput into Loki distributors across all clusters. Represents raw log volume before compression.

panels.title: Metrics Ingestion
panels.description: Total samples per second ingested by Mimir distributors. Core metric for time series volume.

panels.title: Trace Ingestion
panels.description: Total spans per second ingested by Tempo distributors across all clusters.

panels.title: Profile Ingestion
panels.description: Total profile samples per second ingested by Pyroscope distributors across all clusters.

panels.title: Total Request Rate
panels.description: Aggregate request rate across all LGTM stack components. Represents total platform API throughput.

panels.title: All Signals — Bytes Ingested Over Time
panels.description: Combined byte-level ingestion across Logs (Loki), Traces (Tempo), and Profiles (Pyroscope). Stacked to show total platform bandwidth consumption and relative signal contribution.

panels.title: Active Series (Mimir)
panels.description: Total active time series in Mimir ingesters by cluster. Core cardinality metric that drives memory usage and query performance.

panels.title: Active Streams (Loki)
panels.description: Total active log streams in Loki ingesters by cluster. Active streams drive memory pressure on ingesters.

panels.title: Log Volume Growth
panels.description: Current log byte ingestion rate vs the same period 7 days ago. Visualizes week-over-week growth trends for capacity planning.

panels.title: Metrics Series Growth
panels.description: Current active series count vs 7 days ago. Reveals cardinality growth trends in Mimir for capacity forecasting.

panels.title: Request Rate by Component
panels.description: Stacked request rate for each LGTM component. Shows relative load distribution across Grafana, Mimir, Loki, Tempo, and Pyroscope.

panels.title: Component Volume Comparison
panels.description: Horizontal bar comparison of request rates across all five LGTM components. Instantly see which component handles the most traffic.

panels.title: Discarded / Rejected Volume
panels.description: Aggregate discard/rejection rates across all signals. Tracks volume waste from rate limits, validation failures, and tenant policy violations.

panels.title: Rejection Rate %
panels.description: Percentage of ingested data that is being discarded per signal. Calculated as discarded / (received + 0.001) * 100. High percentages indicate misconfiguration or aggressive rate limiting.

options.content: Navigate to Loki Volume Mimir Volume Tempo Volume Pyroscope Volume Cross-Signal Deep Dive
